def flatten_tree(node, results=None):
    if results is None:
        results = []
    results.append(node.value)
    for child in node.children:
        flatten_tree(child, results)
    return results


def find_all_descendants(root):
    descendants = []
    for child in root.children:
        descendants.append(child)
        descendants.extend(find_all_descendants(child))
    return descendants


def count_nested_items(structure):
    total = 0
    for item in structure:
        if isinstance(item, list):
            total += count_nested_items(item)
        else:
            total += 1
    return total
